notes: No public national live station-outage feed is currently loaded. The dashboard uses the PM&C dated retail stock-out snapshot as partial public coverage and does not imply live national outage visibility.
citation: Fuel Resilience AU source review; PM&C retail stock-out snapshot remains the loaded partial public source.

fields.loaded_partial_coverage: State and territory petrol/diesel stock-out counts plus an Australia-wide diesel total as a dated PM&C public snapshot.
missing_coverage: Australia-wide petrol total in the PM&C table
